full_text:
Jie Xiang (Yuanze) “Lord Jie” 介象 (元則) “介君”
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Jie Xiang (介象)aka“Lord Jie” (介君), styledYuanze (元則), was born in Kuaiji commandery. An immortal who was favored by Sun Quan. Jie Xiang was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
